-hu.notes: For my understanding, it serves as description of collective concept or expression of plentiness. I may be wrong, thus I set certainty of translation for '-hu' compound words on 'medium'

-a.notes: Extracted from Voca - as game description describes Voca as 'voices/screams' , I deducted that Voc would be singular 'voice/scream'. Additionaly, it gave me an idea for plural noun suffix (-a), which I will use until I find more suitable replacement

-un.notes: Contexts of '-un' known usage makes 'dimuitive(?)' meaning low probable
